sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91177" key="pterwtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτερ-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n91177.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for plumage</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">καθαρότης</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:25p.477M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25p.477M.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
